title: maba pervilleana
intro: Maba pervilleana, also known as the Lesser Maba or Maba fruit, is a small evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of the Indo-Pacific region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which contains a compound called mabain, a potential anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Maba pervilleana include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the bark is often dried and made into a decoction or infused in hot water to create a remedy for various ailments.
